_comment: New York City Zoning — Residential R2 Low-Density Zone
_source: NYC Zoning Resolution Chapter 2 (NYC Department of City Planning)
_units: All distances in metres (m — original rules converted from feet), areas in sq.m, percentages as numbers
region_name: USA — New York City (Zoning Resolution R2 Zone)

_notes: R2 zone: Low-density detached single-family or two-family residences
Side yards: combined min 13ft (3.96m), each min 5ft (1.52m)
FAR = 0.5 (very low — NYC R2 preserves suburban character)
Max height = 35ft = 10.67m with sky exposure plane rules
Max lot coverage = 30% of lot area
Parking: 1 stall per dwelling unit required

parking.notes: 1 off-street parking space required per dwelling unit in R2 zone.

_notes: C1-1 overlay zone (neighbourhood commercial) — simplified rules
Commercial zones in NYC are highly complex; consult an architect for full compliance

parking.notes: Varies significantly by use type. Consult NYC Zoning Resolution §36.
